allow:
Bash(powershell -c "
\\$shell = New-Object -COM WScript.Shell
\\$pythonw = 'C:\\\\Users\\\\steve\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\Programs\\\\Python\\\\Python314\\\\pythonw.exe'
\\$target = 'E:\\\\AI Tools\\\\whisper\\\\whisper.py'
\\$workdir = 'E:\\\\AI Tools\\\\whisper'
\\$icon = 'E:\\\\AI Tools\\\\whisper\\\\whisper.ico'

\\$shortcuts = @\(
    'C:\\\\Users\\\\steve\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\Whisper.lnk',
    'C:\\\\Users\\\\steve\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Whisper.lnk',
    'E:\\\\AI Tools\\\\whisper\\\\Whisper.lnk'
\)

foreach \(\\$path in \\$shortcuts\) {
    \\$lnk = \\$shell.CreateShortcut\(\\$path\)
    \\$lnk.TargetPath = \\$pythonw
    \\$lnk.Arguments = \\"\\`\\"\\$target\\`\\"\\"
    \\$lnk.WorkingDirectory = \\$workdir
    \\$lnk.IconLocation = \\$icon
    \\$lnk.Save\(\)
    Write-Host \\"Updated: \\$path\\"
}")
